pages.homepage_text:
Summit Auto Repair is a auto repair in Raleigh, NC. Founded 2012. We're a team of 9.
Why Raleigh chooses us
For more than 14 years Summit Auto Repair has served Raleigh and the surrounding NC region with dependable, locally-operated auto repair work. Our team of 9 knows the neighborhoods, the buildings, and the seasonal rhythms that shape what our clients actually need — the kind of practical knowledge you only build by showing up in the same zip codes year after year.
Who we serve
We work with homeowners, small businesses, and repeat commercial accounts across Raleigh. Whether you've worked with a auto repair before or this is your first project, we walk every new client through the process step by step: what to expect, what options exist at your price point, and what we'd recommend if the job were on our own property. No hard sell, no upsell theatre, no contracts you can't cancel.
What we do
Our core offerings cover oil changes, brake service, transmission repair, and state inspections. Every engagement starts with a site walkthrough and a written scope so there are no surprises on invoice day.
- Oil changes
- Brake service
- Transmission repair
- State inspections
Credentials & proof
Summit Auto Repair is fully insured and holds every permit and certification the state of NC requires for our trade. Our team of 9 collectively brings decades of hands-on experience, and we publish before-and-after galleries, customer reviews, and project case studies so prospective clients can see the actual work — not just marketing renders.
Get in touch
Email: hello@example.test · Phone: (555) 555-0100
